title: Part 6: Markdown Rendering & Syntax Highlighting
description: Fix headings parsing, restrict syntax highlighting to backticks, and auto-detect code languages. Ref: work_reports/tasks_subdivision/6_markdown_rendering_and_syntax_highlighting.md
result: Successfully improved Markdown parsing for headings and lists. Integrated renderMarkdown into tool_result processing in addCollapsibleBubble, allowing rich text inside tool results. Removed global monospace from tool results to support mixed content. Consolidated rendering cache to mRenderedTextCache. Verified build.
